name: Karmic Fate
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Atonement
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard two cards or drain a (soulstone). If it does so, an enemy Minako Rei model heals 2, then discard this upgrade.

granted_abilities.name: Demise (Final Reward)
granted_abilities.text: After this model is killed, the opposing player may summon a Katashiro in base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: The limitations section shows a single dash '-', indicating no limitations apply to this upgrade.
This is an upgrade card marked as 'Upgrade' at the bottom of the card.
Both abilities are passive triggered abilities (Atonement triggers on activation, Demise triggers on death).
